parsed.recommendation_text: For fast phone charging, the Anker Nano 67W charger is highly recommended. It offers dual USB-C ports for simultaneous charging and supports GaN technology for compactness and efficiency. Despite warming up under full load, its fast-charging capabilities make it a top choice. The Belkin charger is also an option due to its ultra-compact size and PPS support, but the single port limits its utility. Samsung's 45W charger provides reliable charging with PPS support but lacks dual ports.
parsed.selection_rationale: Anker Nano 67W offers best balance of power, efficiency, and brand recognition.
